use_cases: Displaying keyboard shortcuts in documentation and help menus
Showing keyboard navigation hints in UI overlays
Rendering individual or combined key indicators for accessibility guides
ai_summary: A keyboard key (kbd) component that renders styled HTML kbd elements with customizable variants (default, outline, solid, secondary) and sizes (xs to lg). Supports single or multiple key display with optional click handlers. Uses CVA for variant management and includes micro-interactions like hover and active press states with subtle translateY animation.
